decisions_made_this_session: FE-S10: Backend GET /export-documents patched to include customs-agent before any UI written — unblocks list page
FE-S10: API proxy route /api/generate-export-doc attaches Bearer token server-side — client component stays auth-free
FE-S10: ValidateForm shown only when status === 'submitted' — no dead buttons for already-approved docs
FE-S10: Playwright installed at workspace root (-w) — shared by all apps, config in repo root
FE-S10: Dockerfiles use 3-stage (base/deps/builder/runner) with repo-root build context — COPY workspace manifests first for layer caching
FE-S10: E2E tests are smoke-only (unauthenticated redirects + public page renders) — authenticated flows deferred to Phase 2 (needs live Keycloak)

FE-S9.note: QR verify + i18n polish — 42 routes, 12 files

FE-S10.note: customs-agent portal + E2E + Docker — 45 routes, 19 files
